--check-hooks\n\tif *checkHooks {\n\t\tcollector, err := metrics.NewHookSessionCollector()\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tfmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, \"Error: %v\\n\", err)\n\t\t\tos.Exit(1)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif collector.AreHooksInstalled() {\n\t\t\tfmt.Println(\"✓ Claude Code hooks are installed\")\n\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"  Hook scripts: %s/hooks/\\n\", collector.GetBaseDir())\n\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"  Session data: %s/sessions/\\n\", collector.GetBaseDir())\n\n\t\t\t// Check for active sessions\n\t\t\tsessions, err := collector.CollectSessions()\n\t\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"  Active sessions: %d\\n\", len(sessions))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tfmt.Println(\"✗ Claude Code hooks are NOT installed\")\n\t\t\tfmt.Println()\n\t\t\tfmt.Println(\"Run 'ccdash --install-hooks' to install them.\")\n\t\t\tos.Exit(1)\n\t\t}\n\t\tos.Exit(0)\n\t}\n\n\t// Check if running in a terminal\n\tif !term.IsTerminal(int(os.Stdout.Fd())) {\n\t\tfmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, \"Error: ccdash must be run in a terminal\")\n\t\tos.Exit(1)\n\t}\n\n\t// Set up hook management with cleanup on exit\n\thookCollector := setupHooks()\n\tif hookCollector != nil {\n\t\tdefer hookCollector.Cleanup()\n\n\t\t// Set up signal handler for graceful shutdown\n\t\tsigChan := make(chan os.Signal, 1)\n\t\tsignal.Notify(sigChan, syscall.SIGINT, syscall.SIGTERM)\n\t\tgo func() {\n\t\t\t<-sigChan\n\t\t\thookCollector.Cleanup()\n\t\t\tos.Exit(0)\n\t\t}()\n\t}\n\n\t// Create and run the dashboard\n\tdashboard := ui.NewDashboard(version)\n\n\t// Add any extra project directories specified via --extra-dirs flag\n\tif *extraDirs != \"\" {\n\t\tvar dirs []string\n\t\tfor _, d := range strings.Split(*extraDirs, \",\") {\n\t\t\tif d = strings.TrimSpace(d); d != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tdirs = append(dirs, d)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif len(dirs) > 0 {\n\t\t\tdashboard.AddProjectsDirs(dirs)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tp := tea.NewProgram(\n\t\tdashboard,\n\t\ttea.WithAltScreen(),       // Use alternate screen buffer\n\t\ttea.WithMouseCellMotion(), // Enable mouse support\n\t)\n\n\tif _, err := p.Run(); err != nil {\n\t\tfmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, \"Error running dashboard: %v\\n\", err)\n\t\tos.Exit(1)\n\t}\n}\n\n// setupHooks installs hooks, registers this instance, and returns the collector for cleanup\nfunc setupHooks() *metrics.HookSessionCollector {\n\tcollector, err := metrics.NewHookSessionCollector()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\t// Silently continue - hooks are optional\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\twasInstalled := collector.AreHooksInstalled()\n\n\t// Always run InstallHooks - it's idempotent and will add any missing hooks\n\tif err := collector.InstallHooks(); err != nil {\n\t\t// Installation failed - continue without hooks (tmux fallback will be used)\n\t\tfmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, \"Note: Could not install Claude Code hooks: %v\\n\", err)\n\t\tfmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, \"      Session tracking will use tmux fallback.\\n\")\n\t\tfmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, \"      Run 'ccdash --install-hooks' to retry.\\n\\n\")\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t// Clean up orphaned session files on startup\n\t// This removes sessions where the process died or tmux session was killed\n\t// without the session-end hook firing\n\tcollector.CleanupOrphanedSessions()\n\n\t// Register this instance for multi-instance tracking\n\tif err := collector.RegisterInstance(); err != nil {\n\t\t// Non-fatal, continue without instance tracking\n\t\treturn collector\n\t}\n\n\t// Only notify on fresh install (not on updates)\n\tif !wasInstalled {\n\t\tfmt.Println(\"✓ Installed Claude Code hooks for session tracking\")\n\t\tfmt.Println(\"  Restart Claude Code sessions for hooks to take effect.\")\n\t\tfmt.Println()\n\t}\n\n\treturn collector\n}\n\nfunc printHelp() {\n\tfmt.Println(\"ccdash - Claude Code Dashboard\")\n\tfmt.Println()\n\tfmt.Printf(\"Version: %s\\n\", nil\n325\t}\n326\t\n327\t// adjustCustomDate adjusts the custom date based on current edit field\n328\tfunc (d *Dashboard) adjustCustomDate(delta int) {\n329\t\tswitch d.lookbackEditField {\n330\t\tcase 0: // Year\n331\t\t\td.lookbackCustomDate = d.lookbackCustomDate.AddDate(delta, 0, 0)\n332\t\tcase 1: // Month\n333\t\t\td.lookbackCustomDate = d.lookbackCustomDate.AddDate(0, delta, 0)\n334\t\tcase 2: // Day\n335\t\t\td.lookbackCustomDate = d.lookbackCustomDate.AddDate(0, 0, delta)\n336\t\tcase 3: // Hour\n337\t\t\td.lookbackCustomDate = d.lookbackCustomDate.Add(time.Duration(delta) * time.Hour)\n338\t\tcase 4: // Minute\n339\t\t\td.lookbackCustomDate = d.lookbackCustomDate.Add(time.Duration(delta) * time.Minute)\n340\t\t}\n341\t\n342\t\t// Clamp to not be in the future\n343\t\tif d.lookbackCustomDate.After(time.Now()) {\n344\t\t\td.lookbackCustomDate = time.Now()\n345\t\t}\n346\t}\n347\t\n348\t// View renders the dashboard\n349\tfunc (d *Dashboard) View() string {\n350\t\tif d.width == 0 {\n351\t\t\treturn \"Initializing...\"\n352\t\t}\n353\t\n354\t\tvar content string\n355\t\n356\t\t// Check if in lookback picker mode\n357\t\tif d.lookbackMode {\n358\t\t\tcontent = d.renderLookbackPicker()\n359\t\t} else if d.helpMode > 0 {\n360\t\t\t// Check if in help mode\n361\t\t\tcontent = d.renderHelpView()\n362\t\t} else {\n363\t\t\tswitch d.layoutMode {\n364\t\t\tcase LayoutUltraWide:\n365\t\t\t\tcontent = d.renderUltraWide()\n366\t\t\tcase LayoutWide:\n367\t\t\t\tcontent = d.renderWide()\n368\t\t\tcase LayoutCompact:\n369\t\t\t\tcontent = d.renderCompact()\n370\t\t\tdefault:\n371\t\t\t\tcontent = d.renderNarrow()\n372\t\t\t}\n373\t\t}\n374\t\n375\t\t// Add status bar\n376\t\tstatusBar := d.renderStatusBar()\n377\t\n378\t\t// Join content and status bar\n379\t\toutput := lipgloss.JoinVertical(lipgloss.Left, content, statusBar)\n380\t\n381\t\t// CRITICAL: Ensure output fills the entire terminal height to prevent\n382\t\t// external process output (like Tailscale logs) from bleeding through\n383\t\t// at the bottom of the screen. Without this, the alternate screen buffer\n384\t\t// may show underlying terminal content in unfilled rows.\n385\t\toutputHeight := lipgloss.Height(output)\n386\t\tif outputHeight < d.height {\n387\t\t\t// Pad with empty lines to fill the screen\n388\t\t\tpadding := strings.Repeat(\"\\n\", d.height-outputHeight-1)\n389\t\t\toutput = output + padding\n390\t\t}\n391\t\n392\t\treturn output\n393\t}\n394\t\n395\t// updateLayout determines the current layout mode based on terminal size\n396\tfunc (d *Dashboard) updateLayout() {\n397\t\tif d.width < 120 {\n398\t\t\t// Compact stacked layout: tmux top, tokens middle, system bottom\n399\t\t\td.layoutMode = LayoutCompact\n400\t\t} else {\n401\t\t\t// Always use 3-column layout for wide terminals\n402\t\t\td.layoutMode = LayoutUltraWide\n403\t\t}\n404\t}\n405\t\n406\t// tick returns a command that sends a tick message every 2 seconds\n407\tfunc (d *Dashboard) tick() tea.Cmd {\n408\t\treturn tea.Tick(2*time.Second, func(t time.Time) tea.Msg {\n409\t\t\treturn tickMsg(t)\n410\t\t})\n411\t}\n412\t\n413\t// metricsMsg carries collected metrics\n414\ttype metricsMsg struct {\n415\t\tsystem metrics.SystemMetrics\n416\t\ttokens *metrics.TokenMetrics\n417\t\ttmux   *metrics.TmuxMetrics\n418\t}\n419\t\n420\t// errMsg carries errors\n421\ttype errMsg struct {\n422\t\terr error\n423\t}\n424\t\n425\t// Metric type constants for cache keys\n426\tconst (\n427\t\tmetricTypeSystem = \"system\"\n428\t\tmetricTypeTmux   = \"tmux\"\n429\t)\n430\t\n431\t// collectMetrics returns a command that collects all metrics\n432\t// Uses leader election: only one instance collects, others read from cache\n433\tfunc (d *Dashboard) collectMetrics() tea.Cmd {\n434\t\treturn func() tea.Msg {\n435\t\t\tcache := d.tokenCollector.GetCache()\n436\t\t\tisLeader := cache.TryAcquireLease(d.instanceID)\n437\t\n438\t\t\tvar system metrics.SystemMetrics\n439\t\t\tvar tokens *metrics.TokenMetrics\n440\t\t\tvar tmux *metrics.TmuxMetrics\n441\t\n442\t\t\t// Use channels to collect results with timeout\n443\t\t\ttype systemResult struct {\n444\t\t\t\tmetrics metrics.SystemMetrics\n445\t\t\t}\n446\t\t\ttype tokenResult struct {\n447\t\t\t\tmetrics *metrics.TokenMetrics\n448\t\t\t}\n449\t\t\ttype tmuxResult struct {\n450\t\t\t\tmetrics *metrics.TmuxMetrics\n451\t\t\t}\n452\t\n453\t\t\tsystemChan := make(chan systemResult, 1)\n454\t\t\ttokenChan := make(chan tokenResult, 1)\n455\t\t\ttmuxChan := make(chan tmuxResult, 1)\n456\t\n457\t\t\t// System metrics: try cache first, collect if leader or cache miss\n458\t\t\tgo func() {\n459\t\t\t\tif !isLeader {\n460\t\t\t\t\tif data, ok := cache.GetCachedMetrics(metricTypeSystem); ok {\n461\t\t\t\t\t\tvar cached metrics.SystemMetrics\n462\t\t\t\t\t\tif json.Unmarshal(data, &cached) == nil {\n463\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsystemChan <- systemResult{metrics: cached}\n464\t\t\t\t\t\t\treturn\n465\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n466\t\t\t\t\t}\n467\t\t\t\t}\n468\t\t\t\t// Leader or cache miss: collect fresh\n469\t\t\t\tm := d.systemCollector.Collect()\n470\t\t\t\tif isLeader {\n471\t\t\t\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(m); err == nil {\n472\t\t\t\t\t\tcache.SetCachedMetrics(metricTypeSystem, data)\n473\t\t\t\t\t}\n474\t\t\t\t}\n475\t\t\t\tsystemChan <- systemResult{metrics: m}\n476\t\t\t}()\n477\t\n478\t\t\t// Token metrics: always collect (uses shared DB, cheap to query)\n479\t\t\tgo func() {\n480\t\t\t\tt, _ := d.tokenCollector.Collect()\n481\t\t\t\ttokenChan <- tokenResult{metrics: t}\n482\t\t\t}()\n483\t\n484\t\t\t// Tmux metrics: try cache first, collect if leader or cache miss\n485\t\t\tgo func() {\n486\t\t\t\tif !isLeader {\n487\t\t\t\t\tif data, ok := cache.GetCachedMetrics(metricTypeTmux); ok {\n488\t\t\t\t\t\tvar cached metrics.TmuxMetrics\n489\t\t\t\t\t\tif json.Unmarshal(data, &cached) == nil {\n490\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttmuxChan <- tmuxResult{metrics: &cached}\n491\t\t\t\t\t\t\treturn\n492\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n493\t\t\t\t\t}\n494\t\t\t\t}\n495\t\t\t\t// Leader or cache miss: collect fresh\n496\t\t\t\tm := d.tmuxCollector.Collect()\n497\t\t\t\tif isLeader {\n498\t\t\t\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(m); err == nil {\n499\t\t\t\t\t\tcache.SetCachedMetrics(metricTypeTmux, data)\n500\t\t\t\t\t}\n501\t\t\t\t}\n502\t\t\t\ttmuxChan <- tmuxResult{metrics: m}\n503\t\t\t}()\n504\t\n505\t\t\t// Wait for results with 3 second timeout\n506\t\t\ttimeout := time.After(3 * time.Second)\n507\t\n508\t\t\t// Collect results as they come in, or timeout\n509\t\t\tfor i := 0; i < 3; i++ {\n510\t\t\t\tselect {\n511\t\t\t\tcase r := <-systemChan:\n512\t\t\t\t\tsystem = r.metrics\n513\t\t\t\tcase r := <-tokenChan:\n514\t\t\t\t\ttokens = r.metrics\n515\t\t\t\tcase r := <-tmuxChan:\n516\t\t\t\t\ttmux = r.metrics\n517\t\t\t\tcase <-timeout:\n518\t\t\t\t\t// Return whatever we have so far\n519\t\t\t\t\treturn metricsMsg{\n520\t\t\t\t\t\tsystem: system,\n521\t\t\t\t\t\ttokens: tokens,\n522\t\t\t\t\t\ttmux:   tmux,\n523\t\t\t\t\t}\n524\t\t\t\t}\n525\t\t\t}\n526\t\n527\t\t\treturn metricsMsg{\n528\t\t\t\tsystem: system,\n529\t\t\t\ttokens: tokens,\n530\t\t\t\ttmux:   tmux,\n531\t\t\t}\n532\t\t}\n533\t}\n534\t\n535\t// calculateTokenPanelWidth determines the optimal width for the token panel\n536\t// based on actual content needs, returning the minimum width that displays well\n537\tfunc (d *Dashboard) calculateTokenPanelWidth() int {\n538\t\t// Base minimum for the panel structure (stacked layout)\n539\t\tminWidth := 46\n540\t\n541\t\t// If no token metrics or not available, use minimum\n542\t\tif d.tokenMetrics == nil || !d.tokenMetrics.Available {\n543\t\t\treturn minWidth\n544\t\t}\n545\t\n546\t\tmodelCount := len(d.tokenMetrics.ModelUsages)\n547\t\n548\t\t// Side-by-side layout needs:\n549\t\t// - Left column: 22 chars (stats)\n550\t\t// - Separator: 2 chars\n551\t\t// - Right column: ~24 chars (model name + cost)\n552\t\t// - Borders/padding: 4 chars\n553\t\t// Total: ~52 chars minimum for side-by-side\n554\t\tif modelCount > 0 {\n555\t\t\t// With models, use side-by-side layout\n556\t\t\t// More models = need slightly more height but same width\n557\t\t\treturn 54\n558\t\t}\n559\t\n560\t\t// Just basic token counts, no models - use narrow layout\n561\t\treturn minWidth\n562\t}\n563\t\n564\t// calculateTmuxPanelWidth determines the width needed for the TMUX panel\n565\t// based on session count and available height (to calculate columns needed)\n566\tfunc (d *Dashboard) calculateTmuxPanelWidth(panelHeight int) int {\n567\t\tconst minCellWidth = 28 // Minimum readable session cell\n568\t\tconst minWidth = 50     // Absolute minimum for 1 column\n569\t\tconst maxWidth = 120    // Cap to prevent TMUX from taking too much space\n570\t\n571\t\t// If no tmux metrics, use minimum\n572\t\tif d.tmuxMetrics == nil || !d.tmuxMetrics.Available {\n573\t\t\treturn minWidth\n574\t\t}\n575\t\n576\t\tsessionCount := len(d.tmuxMetrics.Sessions)\n577\t\tif sessionCount == 0 {\n578\t\t\treturn minWidth\n579\t\t}\n580\t\n581\t\t// Available lines for sessions: height - title(1) - borders(2)\n582\t\tavailableLines := panelHeight - 3\n583\t\tif availableLines < 1 {\n584\t\t\tavailableLines = 1\n585\t\t}\n586\t\n587\t\t// Calculate columns needed to fit all sessions\n588\t\tcols := 1\n589\t\tif sessionCount > availableLines {\n590\t\t\tcols = (sessionCount + availableLines - 1) / availableLines // ceil division\n591\t\t}\n592\t\tif cols > 4 {\n593\t\t\tcols = 4 // Reasonable maximum for readability\n594\t\t}\n595\t\n596\t\t// Width needed: columns * cellWidth + separators + borders/padding\n597\t\t// contentWidth = cols * cellWidth + (cols - 1) for separators\n598\t\t// panelWidth = contentWidth + 4 for borders/padding\n599\t\tneededWidth := cols*minCellWidth + (cols - 1) + 4\n600\t\n601\t\tif neededWidth < minWidth {\n602\t\t\treturn minWidth\n603\t\t}\n604\t\tif neededWidth > maxWidth {\n605\t\t\treturn maxWidth\n606\t\t}\n607\t\treturn neededWidth\n608\t}\n609\t\n610\t// getTmuxColumnCount returns the number of columns needed to display all sessions\n611\tfunc (d *Dashboard) getTmuxColumnCount(panelHeight int) int {\n612\t\tif d.tmuxMetrics == nil || !d.tmuxMetrics.Available {\n613\t\t\treturn 1\n614\t\t}\n615\t\n616\t\tsessionCount := len(d.tmuxMetrics.Sessions)\n617\t\tif sessionCount == 0 {\n618\t\t\treturn 1\n619\t\t}\n620\t\n621\t\tavailableLines := panelHeight - 3\n622\t\tif availableLines < 1 {\n623\t\t\tavailableLines = 1\n624\t\t}\n625\t\n626\t\tcols := 1\n627\t\tif sessionCount > availableLines {\n628\t\t\tcols = (sessionCount + availableLines - 1) / availableLines\n629\t\t}\n630\t\tif cols > 4 {\n631\t\t\tcols = 4\n632\t\t}\n633\t\treturn cols\n634\t}\n635\t\n636\t// renderUltraWide renders 3 panels side-by-side\n637\t// Balances space between Token and TMUX panels based on content needs\n638\tfunc (d *Dashboard) renderUltraWide() string {\n639\t\t// Account for panel padding (0,1) which adds 2 chars per panel = 6 total\n640\t\ttotalPanelWidth := d.width - 6\n641\t\tpanelHeight := d.height - 3 // -2 borders, -1 status line\n642\t\n643\t\t// Step 1: System panel gets fixed width for CPU bars\n644\t\tsystemWidth := 60\n645\t\tif totalPanelWidth < 180 {\n646\t\t\tsystemWidth = 55\n647\t\t}\n648\t\n649\t\t// Step 2: Calculate minimum and ideal widths for both panels\n650\t\tminTokenWidth := 46\n651\t\tminTmuxWidth := d.calculateTmuxPanelWidth(panelHeight)\n652\t\n653\t\t// Ideal token width: side-by-side layout with comfortable model display\n654\t\t// Left column (22) + separator (2) + right column for models\n655\t\t// Right column needs: model name (up to 15) + cost (8) + tokens (12) = ~35\n656\t\t// Total ideal: 22 + 2 + 35 + 4 (borders) = 60\n657\t\tidealTokenWidth := 60\n658\t\n659\t\t// Ideal tmux width: minimum cell width + some padding for session names\n660\t\t// Use 35 chars per cell (28 min + 7 for longer names)\n661\t\tidealCellWidth := 35\n662\t\ttmuxCols := d.getTmuxColumnCount(panelHeight)\n663\t\tidealTmuxWidth := tmuxCols*idealCellWidth + (tmuxCols - 1) + 4\n664\t\n665\t\t// Available space after system panel\n666\t\tavailableWidth := totalPanelWidth - systemWidth\n667\t\n668\t\t// Start with minimums\n669\t\ttokenWidth := minTokenWidth\n670\t\ttmuxWidth := minTmuxWidth\n671\t\n672\t\t// Calculate how much each panel wants beyond minimum\n673\t\ttokenWant := idealTokenWidth - minTokenWidth\n674\t\tif tokenWant < 0 {\n675\t\t\ttokenWant = 0\n676\t\t}\n677\t\ttmuxWant := idealTmuxWidth - minTmuxWidth\n678\t\tif tmuxWant < 0 {\n679\t\t\ttmuxWant = 0\n680\t\t}\n681\t\n682\t\t// Distribute remaining space proportionally based on wants\n683\t\tremainingAfterMins := availableWidth - minTokenWidth - minTmuxWidth\n684\t\tif remainingAfterMins > 0 {\n685\t\t\ttotalWant := tokenWant + tmuxWant\n686\t\t\tif totalWant > 0 {\n687\t\t\t\t// Proportional allocation\n688\t\t\t\ttokenExtra := remainingAfterMins * tokenWant / totalWant\n689\t\t\t\ttmuxExtra := remainingAfterMins - tokenExtra\n690\t\t\t\ttokenWidth = minTokenWidth + tokenExtra\n691\t\t\t\ttmuxWidth = minTmuxWidth + tmuxExtra\n692\t\t\t} else {\n693\t\t\t\t// Neither wants more, split evenly\n694\t\t\t\ttokenWidth = minTokenWidth + remainingAfterMins/2\n695\t\t\t\ttmuxWidth = minTmuxWidth + remainingAfterMins - remainingAfterMins/2\n696\t\t\t}\n697\t\t} else if remainingAfterMins < 0 {\n698\t\t\t// Not enough space for both minimums - compress proportionally\n699\t\t\tdeficit := -remainingAfterMins\n700\t\t\ttotalMin := minTokenWidth + minTmuxWidth\n701\t\t\t// Reduce each panel proportionally to its minimum\n702\t\t\ttokenReduction := deficit * minTokenWidth / totalMin\n703\t\t\ttmuxReduction := deficit - tokenReduction\n704\t\t\ttokenWidth = minTokenWidth - tokenReduction\n705\t\t\ttmuxWidth = minTmuxWidth - tmuxReduction\n706\t\t\t// Enforce absolute minimums\n707\t\t\tif tokenWidth < 30 {\n708\t\t\t\ttokenWidth = 30\n709\t\t\t\ttmuxWidth = availableWidth - tokenWidth\n710\t\t\t}\n711\t\t\tif tmuxWidth < 30 {\n712\t\t\t\ttmuxWidth = 30\n713\t\t\t\ttokenWidth = availableWidth - tmuxWidth\n714\t\t\t}\n715\t\t}\n716\t\n717\t\t// Cap token panel - it doesn't need more than ideal\n718\t\tif tokenWidth > idealTokenWidth {\n719\t\t\texcess := tokenWidth - idealTokenWidth\n720\t\t\ttokenWidth = idealTokenWidth\n721\t\t\ttmuxWidth += excess\n722\t\t}\n723\t\n724\t\t// Final safety: ensure widths are positive\n725\t\tif tokenWidth < 1 {\n726\t\t\ttokenWidth = 1\n727\t\t}\n728\t\tif tmuxWidth < 1 {\n729\t\t\ttmuxWidth = 1\n730\t\t}\n731\t\n732\t\tsystemPanel := d.renderSystemPanel(systemWidth, panelHeight)\n733\t\ttokenPanel := d.renderTokenPanel(tokenWidth, panelHeight)\n734\t\ttmuxPanel := d.renderTmuxPanel(tmuxWidth, panelHeight)\n735\t\n736\t\t// Force all panels to exactly the same height using lipgloss\n737\t\t// This ensures borders align even if content varies\n738\t\tuniformHeight := lipgloss.NewStyle().Height(panelHeight)\n739\t\tsystemPanel = uniformHeight.Render(systemPanel)\n740\t\ttokenPanel = uniformHeight.Render(tokenPanel)\n741\t\ttmuxPanel = uniformHeight.Render(tmuxPanel)\n742\t\n743\t\t// Join horizontally with top alignment\n744\t\treturn lipgloss.JoinHorizontal(lipgloss.Top,\n745\t\t\tsystemPanel,\n746\t\t\ttokenPanel,\n747\t\t\ttmuxPanel,\n748\t\t)\n749\t}\n750\t\n751\t// renderWide renders 2 panels on top, 1 on bottom\n752\tfunc (d *Dashboard) renderWide() string {\n753\t\tpanelWidth := (d.width - 3) / 2 // 2 panels with spacing\n754\t\ttopHeight := (d.height - 4) / 2 // Split height\n755\t\tbottomHeight := d.height - topHeight - 4\n756\t\n757\t\tsystemPanel := d.renderSystemPanel(panelWidth, topHeight)\n758\t\ttokenPanel := d.renderTokenPanel(panelWidth, topHeight)\n759\t\ttmuxPanel := d.renderTmuxPanel(d.width-2, bottomHeight)\n760\t\n761\t\ttopRow := lipgloss.JoinHorizontal(lipgloss.Top, systemPanel, \" \", tokenPanel)\n762\t\n763\t\treturn lipgloss.JoinVertical(lipgloss.Left, topRow, tmuxPanel)\n764\t}\n765\t\n766\t// renderNarrow renders panels stacked vertically\n767\tfunc (d *Dashboard) renderNarrow() string {\n768\t\tpanelWidth := d.width - 2\n769\t\tpanelHeight := (d.height - 5) / 3 // 3 panels stacked\n770\t\n771\t\tsystemPanel := d.renderSystemPanel(panelWidth, panelHeight)\n772\t\ttokenPanel := d.renderTokenPanel(panelWidth, panelHeight)\n773\t\ttmuxPanel := d.renderTmuxPanel(panelWidth, panelHeight)\n774\t\n775\t\treturn lipgloss.JoinVertical(lipgloss.Left,\n776\t\t\tsystemPanel,\n777\t\t\ttokenPanel,\n778\t\t\ttmuxPanel,\n779\t\t)\n780\t}\n781\t\n782\t// renderCompact renders panels stacked vertically for narrow terminals (e.g. 75x68):\n783\t// tmux sessions on top, token usage in the middle, system resources on the bottom.\n784\t// Height is distributed with tmux getting extra rows since session lists are tall.\n785\tfunc (d *Dashboard) renderCompact() string {\n786\t\tpanelWidth := d.width - 2\n787\t\tavailable := d.height - 8 // 3×2 border rows + 1 status line + 1 repo/updater line\n788\t\n789\t\t// Give tmux a bit more room — sessions need more lines than the other panels\n790\t\ttmuxHeight := available / 2\n791\t\tremaining := available - tmuxHeight\n792\t\ttokenHeight := remaining / 2\n793\t\tsystemHeight := remaining - tokenHeight\n794\t\n795\t\t// Enforce a sensible minimum so panels don't collapse\n796\t\tif tmuxHeight < 8 {\n797\t\t\ttmuxHeight = 8\n798\t\t}\n799\t\tif tokenHeight < 8 {\n800\t\t\ttokenHeight = 8\n801\t\t}\n802\t\tif systemHeight < 8 {\n803\t\t\tsystemHeight = 8\n804\t\t}\n805\t\n806\t\ttmuxPanel := d.renderTmuxPanel(panelWidth, tmuxHeight)\n807\t\ttokenPanel := d.renderTokenPanel(panelWidth, tokenHeight)\n808\t\tsystemPanel := d.renderSystemPanel(panelWidth, systemHeight)\n809\t\n810\t\treturn lipgloss.JoinVertical(lipgloss.Left,\n811\t\t\ttmuxPanel,\n812\t\t\ttokenPanel,\n813\t\t\tsystemPanel,\n814\t\t)\n815\t}\n816\t\n817\t// renderSystemPanel renders the system resources panel\n818\tfunc (d *Dashboard) renderSystemPanel(width, height int) string {\n819\t\tstyle := panelStyle\n820\t\n821\t\tvar lines []string\n822\t\n823\t\t// Title (with emoji like unified-dashboard)\n824\t\tlines = append(lines, successStyle.Render(\"⚡ System Resources\"))\n825\t\n826\t\t// Load average\n827\t\tif d.systemMetrics.Load.Error == nil {\n828\t\t\tlines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Load: %.2f %.2f %.2f\",\n829\t\t\t\td.systemMetrics.Load.Load1,\n830\t\t\t\td.systemMetrics.Load.Load5,\n831\t\t\t\td.systemMetrics.Load.Load15))\n832\t\t} else {\n833\t\t\tlines = append(lines, errorStyle.Render(\"Load: N/A\"))\n834\t\t}\n835\t\n836\t\t// Calculate content width (panel width minus borders and padding)\n837\t\tcontentWidth := width - 4 // -2 for borders, -2 for padding\n838\t\n839\t\t// CPU Total - use same calculation method as Mem/Swap for consistent bar width\n840\t\tif d.systemMetrics.CPU.Error == nil {\n841\t\t\t// Format: \"CPU [|||||| XX.X%]\" - \"CPU \" is 4 chars\n842\t\t\tcpuBarWidth := contentWidth - 4 // Subtract \"CPU \" prefix\n843\t\t\tif cpuBarWidth < 10 {\n844\t\t\t\tcpuBarWidth = 10\n845\t\t\t}\n846\t\t\tlines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(\"CPU %s\", d.renderBar(d.systemMetrics.CPU.TotalPercent, cpuBarWidth)))\n847\t\n848\t\t\t// CPU per-core - use up to 6 lines for CPU display\n849\t\t\tmaxCoreLines := 6\n850\t\t\ttotalCores := len(d.systemMetrics.CPU.PerCore)\n851\t\n852\t\t\t// Determine label width based on total cores (for alignment)\n853\t\t\tlabelWidth := 1\n854\t\t\tif totalCores >= 100 {\n855\t\t\t\tlabelWidth = 3\n856\t\t\t} else if totalCores >= 10 {\n857\t\t\t\tlabelWidth = 2\n858\t\t\t}\n859\t\n860\t\t\t// Determine cores per line\n861\t\t\tvar coresPerLine int\n862\t\t\tif totalCores <= 6 {\n863\t\t\t\tcoresPerLine = 1 // One core per line - bars stretch full width\n864\t\t\t} else {\n865\t\t\t\t// Multiple cores per line - calculate how many fit\n866\t\t\t\t// Each core needs: labelWidth + \":[\" + barContent + \"]\" + space\n867\t\t\t\t// Minimum reasonable bar content is about 12 chars\n868\t\t\t\tminCharsPerCore := labelWidth + 3 + 12 // label + \":[]\" + min bar\n869\t\t\t\tcoresPerLine = contentWidth / minCharsPerCore\n870\t\t\t\tif coresPerLine < 2 {\n871\t\t\t\t\tcoresPerLine = 2 // At least 2 per line when splitting\n872\t\t\t\t}\n873\t\t\t}\n874\t\n875\t\t\t// Calculate bar width for cores - align brackets by using fixed widths\n876\t\t\tvar barWidth int\n877\t\t\tif coresPerLine == 1 {\n878\t\t\t\t// Single core per line - match memory/swap calculation for consistency\n879\t\t\t\t// Format: \"NN:[||||... XXX%]\"\n880\t\t\t\t// labelWidth + \":[]\" = labelWidth + 3 chars overhead\n881\t\t\t\tbarWidth = contentWidth - labelWidth - 3\n882\t\t\t\tif barWidth < 10 {\n883\t\t\t\t\tbarWidth = 10\n884\t\t\t\t}\n885\t\t\t} else {\n886\t\t\t\t// Multiple cores per line - split width evenly\n887\t\t\t\t// Account for spaces between cores (1 space separator)\n888\t\t\t\tspacesBetween := coresPerLine - 1\n889\t\t\t\twidthPerCore := (contentWidth - spacesBetween) / coresPerLine\n890\t\t\t\t// Subtract label overhead: labelWidth + \":[]\"\n891\t\t\t\tbarWidth = widthPerCore - labelWidth - 3\n892\t\t\t\tif barWidth < 8 {\n893\t\t\t\t\tbarWidth = 8\n894\t\t\t\t}\n895\t\t\t}\n896\t\n897\t\t\t// Max cores we can display with 6 lines\n898\t\t\tmaxDisplayCores := coresPerLine * maxCoreLines\n899\t\t\tmaxCores := totalCores\n900\t\t\tif maxCores > maxDisplayCores {\n901\t\t\t\tmaxCores = maxDisplayCores\n902\t\t\t}\n903\t\n904\t\t\tvar coreLine strings.Builder\n905\t\t\tlinesUsed := 0\n906\t\t\tfor i := 0; i < maxCores; i++ {\n907\t\t\t\tif i > 0 && i%coresPerLine == 0 {\n908\t\t\t\t\t// Start new line\n909\t\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, coreLine.String())\n910\t\t\t\t\tcoreLine.Reset()\n911\t\t\t\t\tlinesUsed++\n912\t\t\t\t\tif linesUsed >= maxCoreLines {\n913\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n914\t\t\t\t\t}\n915\t\t\t\t}\n916\t\t\t\tif coreLine.Len() > 0 {\n917\t\t\t\t\tcoreLine.WriteString(\" \")\n918\t\t\t\t}\n919\t\t\t\t// Render progress bar for this core with calculated width\n920\t\t\t\t// Use consistent label width for alignment - brackets align because\n921\t\t\t\t// we use fixed-width labels and fixed-width bar content\n922\t\t\t\tpercent := d.systemMetrics.CPU.PerCore[i]\n923\t\t\t\tminiBar := d.renderMiniBar(percent, barWidth)\n924\t\t\t\tcoreLine.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%*d:[%s]\", labelWidth, i, miniBar))\n925\t\t\t}\n926\t\t\t// Add remaining cores on current line\n927\t\t\tif coreLine.Len() > 0 {\n928\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, coreLine.String())\n929\t\t\t}\n930\t\n931\t\t\tif totalCores > maxCores {\n932\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, dimStyle.Render(fmt.Sprintf(\"+%d more cores\", totalCores-maxCores)))\n933\t\t\t}\n934\t\t} else {\n935\t\t\tlines = append(lines, errorStyle.Render(\"CPU: N/A\"))\n936\t\t}\n937\t\n938\t\t// Memory - always compact (one line)\n939\t\tif d.systemMetrics.Memory.Error == nil {\n940\t\t\tmemUsed := metrics.FormatBytes(d.systemMetrics.Memory.Used)\n941\t\t\tmemTotal := metrics.FormatBytes(d.systemMetrics.Memory.Total)\n942\t\t\t// Format: \"Mem [||||...] XX.XX GB/XX.XX GB\"\n943\t\t\t// Calculate bar width: contentWidth - \"Mem \" (4) - \" \" (1) - \"used/total\" - margins\n944\t\t\tbarWidth := contentWidth - 5 - len(memUsed) - 1 - len(memTotal)\n945\t\t\tif barWidth < 10 {\n946\t\t\t\tbarWidth = 10\n947\t\t\t}\n948\t\t\tlines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Mem %s %s/%s\",\n949\t\t\t\td.renderBar(d.systemMetrics.Memory.Percentage, barWidth),\n950\t\t\t\tmemUsed, memTotal))\n951\t\t} else {\n952\t\t\tlines = append(lines, errorStyle.Render(\"Mem: N/A\"))\n953\t\t}\n954\t\n955\t\t// Swap - always compact (one line)\n956\t\tif d.systemMetrics.Swap.Error == nil && d.systemMetrics.Swap.Total > 0 {\n957\t\t\tswpUsed := metrics.FormatBytes(d.systemMetrics.Swap.Used)\n958\t\t\tswpTotal := metrics.FormatBytes(d.systemMetrics.Swap.Total)\n959\t\t\t// Use same calculation as Memory for consistency\n960\t\t\tbarWidth := contentWidth - 5 - len(swpUsed) - 1 - len(swpTotal)\n961\t\t\tif barWidth < 10 {\n962\t\t\t\tbarWidth = 10\n963\t\t\t}\n964\t\t\tlines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Swp %s %s/%s\",\n965\t\t\t\td.renderBar(d.systemMetrics.Swap.Percentage, barWidth),\n966\t\t\t\tswpUsed, swpTotal))\n967\t\t}\n968\t\n969\t\t// Disk Usage - always compact (one line)\n970\t\tif d.systemMetrics.DiskUsage.Error == nil {\n971\t\t\tdiskUsed := metrics.FormatBytes(d.systemMetrics.DiskUsage.Used)\n972\t\t\tdiskTotal := metrics.FormatBytes(d.systemMetrics.DiskUsage.Total)\n973\t\t\t// Use same calculation as Memory for consistency\n974\t\t\tbarWidth := contentWidth - 5 - len(diskUsed) - 1 - len(diskTotal)\n975\t\t\tif barWidth < 10 {\n976\t\t\t\tbarWidth = 10\n977\t\t\t}\n978\t\t\tlines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Dsk %s %s/%s\",\n979\t\t\t\td.renderBar(d.systemMetrics.DiskUsage.Percentage, barWidth),\n980\t\t\t\tdiskUsed, diskTotal))\n981\t\t} else {\n982\t\t\tlines = append(lines, errorStyle.Render(\"Dsk: N/A\"))\n983\t\t}\n984\t\n985\t\t// Disk I/O - verbose format with pipe separators\n986\t\tif d.systemMetrics.DiskIO.Error == nil {\n987\t\t\tlines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Disk I/O | Read: %s | Write: %s\",\n988\t\t\t\tmetrics.FormatRate(d.systemMetrics.DiskIO.ReadBytesPerSec),\n989\t\t\t\tmetrics.FormatRate(d.systemMetrics.DiskIO.WriteBytesPerSec)))\n990\t\t} else {\n991\t\t\tlines = append(lines, errorStyle.Render(\"Disk I/O | N/A\"))\n992\t\t}\n993\t\n994\t\t// Net I/O - verbose format with pipe separators\n995\t\tif d.systemMetrics.NetIO.Error == nil {\n996\t\t\tlines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Net I/O  | Recv: %s | Sent: %s\",\n997\t\t\t\tmetrics.FormatRate(d.systemMetrics.NetIO.RecvBytesPerSec),\n998\t\t\t\tmetrics.FormatRate(d.systemMetrics.NetIO.SentBytesPerSec)))\n999\t\t} else {\n1000\t\t\tlines = append(lines, errorStyle.Render(\"Net I/O  | N/A\"))\n1001\t\t}\n1002\t\n1003\t\tcontent := strings.Join(lines, \"\\n\")\n1004\t\treturn style.Width(width).Height(height).Render(content)\n1005\t}\n1006\t\n1007\t// renderNetworkPanel renders network I/O metrics with per-interface breakdown\n1008\tfunc (d *Dashboard) renderNetworkPanel(width, height int) string {\n1009\t\tstyle := panelStyle\n1010\t\n1011\t\tvar lines []string\n1012\t\n1013\t\t// Title\n1014\t\tlines = append(lines, successStyle.Render(\"📡 Network I/O\"))\n1015\t\n1016\t\tcontentWidth := width - 4 // Account for borders and padding\n1017\t\n1018\t\t// Show aggregate rates if available\n1019\t\tif d.systemMetrics.NetIO.Error == nil {\n1020\t\t\t// Calculate width for rate bars - leave room for labels and values\n1021\t\t\t// Format: \"Recv [||||...] XX.XX KB/s\"\n1022\t\t\tmaxRateWidth := 12 // \"XXX.XX KB/s\"\n1023\t\t\trateBarWidth := contentWidth - 6 - maxRateWidth // \"Recv \" + bar + \" rate\"\n1024\t\t\tif rateBarWidth < 8 {\n1025\t\t\t\trateBarWidth = 8\n1026\t\t\t}\n1027\t\n1028\t\t\t// Normalize rates for bar display (cap at 10 MB/s for full bar)\n1029\t\t\tconst maxDisplayRate = 10 * 1024 * 1024 // 10 MB/s\n1030\t\t\trecvPercent := (d.systemMetrics.NetIO.RecvBytesPerSec / maxDisplayRate) * 100\n1031\t\t\tsentPercent := (d.systemMetrics.NetIO.SentBytesPerSec / maxDisplayRate) * 100\n1032\t\t\tif recvPercent > 100 {\n1033\t\t\t\trecvPercent = 100\n1034\t\t\t}\n1035\t\t\tif sentPercent > 100 {\n1036\t\t\t\tsentPercent = 100\n1037\t\t\t}\n1038\t\n1039\t\t\trecvRate := metrics.FormatRate(d.systemMetrics.NetIO.RecvBytesPerSec)\n1040\t\t\tsentRate := metrics.FormatRate(d.systemMetrics.NetIO.SentBytesPerSec)\n1041\t\n1042\t\t\tlines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Recv %s %s\",\n1043\t\t\t\td.renderBar(recvPercent, rateBarWidth), recvRate))\n1044\t\t\tlines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Sent %s %s\",\n1045\t\t\t\td.renderBar(sentPercent, rateBarWidth), sentRate))\n1046\t\t} else {\n1047\t\t\tlines = append(lines, errorStyle.Render(\"Aggregate: N/A\"))\n1048\t\t}\n1049\t\n1050\t\t// Separator\n1051\t\tlines = append(lines, \"\")\n1052\t\n1053\t\t// Per-interface breakdown\n1054\t\tif d.systemMetrics.NetIO.Error == nil && len(d.systemMetrics.NetIO.Interfaces) > 0 {\n1055\t\t\t// Calculate column widths for alignment\n1056\t\t\t// Format: \"eth0: ↓ XX.XX KB/s  ↑ YY.YY KB/s  | Total: ↓ ZZ.ZZ GB  ↑ WW.WW GB\"\n1057\t\t\tconst ifaceNameWidth = 8 // Max interface name width\n1058\t\t\tconst rateWidth = 10    // \"XX.XX KB/s\"\n1059\t\t\tconst totalWidth = 10   // \"ZZ.ZZ GB\"\n1060\t\n1061\t\t\tlines = append(lines, dimStyle.Render(\"Interface              Rate                Total\"))\n1062\t\t\tlines = append(lines, dimStyle.Render(\"─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\"))\n1063\t\n1064\t\t\tfor _, iface := range d.systemMetrics.NetIO.Interfaces {\n1065\t\t\t\trecvRate := metrics.FormatRate(iface.RecvBytesPerSec)\n1066\t\t\t\tsentRate := metrics.FormatRate(iface.SentBytesPerSec)\n1067\t\t\t\ttotalRecv := metrics.FormatBytes(iface.TotalRecvBytes)\n1068\t\t\t\ttotalSent := metrics.FormatBytes(iface.TotalSentBytes)\n1069\t\n1070\t\t\t\t// Format: \"ifaceName: ↓ rate  ↑ rate  | ↓ total  ↑ total\"\n1071\t\t\t\t// Using unicode arrows for direction indicators\n1072\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(\"%-*s ↓ %-*s ↑ %-*s  | ↓ %-*s ↑ %s\",\n1073\t\t\t\t\tifaceNameWidth, iface.Name,\n1074\t\t\t\t\trateWidth, recvRate,\n1075\t\t\t\t\trateWidth, sentRate,\n1076\t\t\t\t\ttotalWidth, totalRecv,\n1077\t\t\t\t\ttotalSent))\n1078\t\t\t}\n1079\t\t} else if d.systemMetrics.NetIO.Error == nil {\n1080\t\t\tlines = append(lines, dimStyle.Render(\"No active interfaces\"))\n1081\t\t} else {\n1082\t\t\tlines = append(lines, errorStyle.Render(\"Interfaces: N/A\"))\n1083\t\t}\n1084\t\n1085\t\tcontent := strings.Join(lines, \"\\n\")\n1086\t\treturn style.Width(width).Height(height).Render(content)\n1087\t}\n1088\t\n1089\t// renderTokenPanel renders the token usage panel with side-by-side layout\n1090\t// Left side: Total token stats, Right side: Per-model costs\n1091\tfunc (d *Dashboard) renderTokenPanel(width, height int) string {\n1092\t\tstyle := panelStyle\n1093\t\n1094\t\tif d.tokenMetrics == nil {\n1095\t\t\treturn style.Width(width).Height(height).Render(\"Loading token metrics...\")\n1096\t\t}\n1097\t\n1098\t\tcontentWidth := width - 4 // Account for borders and padding\n1099\t\n1100\t\t// Title with lookback info aligned right\n1101\t\ttitle := successStyle.Render(\"💰 Token Usage\")\n1102\t\tlookbackInfo := \"\"\n1103\t\tif d.tokenMetrics != nil && !d.tokenMetrics.LookbackFrom.IsZero() {\n1104\t\t\t// Format start time - use date if not this week\n1105\t\t\tnow := time.Now()\n1106\t\t\tstartTime := d.tokenMetrics.LookbackFrom\n1107\t\t\telapsed := now.Sub(startTime)\n1108\t\n1109\t\t\t// Choose format based on how long ago\n1110\t\t\tvar timeStr string\n1111\t\t\tif elapsed < 7*24*time.Hour {\n1112\t\t\t\ttimeStr = startTime.Format(\"Mon 3:04pm\")\n1113\t\t\t} else {\n1114\t\t\t\ttimeStr = startTime.Format(\"Jan 2 3:04pm\")\n1115\t\t\t}\n1116\t\n1117\t\t\t// Add human-readable duration\n1118\t\t\tdurationStr := metrics.FormatDuration(elapsed)\n1119\t\t\tlookbackInfo = dimStyle.Render(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s → Now (%s)\", timeStr, durationStr))\n1120\t\t} else if d.tokenMetrics != nil {\n1121\t\t\tlookbackInfo = dimStyle.Render(\"All time\")\n1122\t\t}\n1123\t\n1124\t\ttitleLen := lipgloss.Width(title)\n1125\t\tlookbackLen := lipgloss.Width(lookbackInfo)\n1126\t\tspacing := contentWidth - titleLen - lookbackLen\n1127\t\tif spacing < 1 {\n1128\t\t\tspacing = 1\n1129\t\t}\n1130\t\theaderLine := title + strings.Repeat(\" \", spacing) + lookbackInfo\n1131\t\n1132\t\tif !d.tokenMetrics.Available {\n1133\t\t\tvar lines []string\n1134\t\t\tlines = append(lines, headerLine)\n1135\t\t\tlines = append(lines, errorStyle.Render(\"Not Available\"))\n1136\t\t\tif d.tokenMetrics.Error != \"\" {\n1137\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, wrapText(d.tokenMetrics.Error, width-4))\n1138\t\t\t}\n1139\t\t\tcontent := strings.Join(lines, \"\\n\")\n1140\t\t\treturn style.Width(width).Height(height).Render(content)\n1141\t\t}\n1142\t\n1143\t\t// Helper to get model style by name\n1144\t\tgetModelStyle := func(modelName string) lipgloss.Style {\n1145\t\t\tif strings.Contains(modelName, \"opus\") {\n1146\t\t\t\treturn lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color(\"#ff6b6b\")) // Red for Opus\n1147\t\t\t} else if strings.Contains(modelName, \"sonnet\") {\n1148\t\t\t\treturn lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color(\"#4ecdc4\")) // Cyan for Sonnet\n1149\t\t\t} else if strings.Contains(modelName, \"haiku\") {\n1150\t\t\t\treturn lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color(\"#95e1d3\")) // Light green for Haiku\n1151\t\t\t} else if strings.Contains(modelName, \"glm\") {\n1152\t\t\t\treturn lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color(\"#00bfff\")) // Blue for GLM\n1153\t\t\t}\n1154\t\t\treturn dimStyle\n1155\t\t}\n1156\t\n1157\t\t// Build left column: Total stats\n1158\t\tvar leftLines []string\n1159\t\thasCacheRead := d.tokenMetrics.CacheReadTokens > 0\n1160\t\thasCacheCreate := d.tokenMetrics.CacheCreationTokens > 0\n1161\t\thasRate := d.tokenMetrics.Rate > 0\n1162\t\thasAvg := d.tokenMetrics.SessionAvgRate > 0\n1163\t\n1164\t\t// Compact format for left column\n1165\t\tleftLines = append(leftLines, fmt.Sprintf(\"In:    %s\", metrics.FormatTokensCompact(d.tokenMetrics.InputTokens)))\n1166\t\tleftLines = append(leftLines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Out:   %s\", metrics.FormatTokensCompact(d.tokenMetrics.OutputTokens)))\n1167\t\tif hasCacheRead {\n1168\t\t\tleftLines = append(leftLines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Cache: %s\", metrics.FormatTokensCompact(d.tokenMetrics.CacheReadTokens)))\n1169\t\t}\n1170\t\tif hasCacheCreate {\n1171\t\t\tleftLines = append(leftLines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Create:%s\", metrics.FormatTokensCompact(d.tokenMetrics.CacheCreationTokens)))\n1172\t\t}\n1173\t\tleftLines = append(leftLines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Total: %s\", boldStyle.Render(metrics.FormatTokensCompact(d.tokenMetrics.TotalTokens))))\n1174\t\tleftLines = append(leftLines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Reqs:  %d\", d.tokenMetrics.Prompts))\n1175\t\tleftLines = append(leftLines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Cost:  %s\", costStyle.Render(metrics.FormatCost(d.tokenMetrics.TotalCost))))\n1176\t\tif hasRate {\n1177\t\t\tleftLines = append(leftLines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Rate:  %s\", dimStyle.Render(metrics.FormatTokenRateCompact(d.tokenMetrics.Rate))))\n1178\t\t}\n1179\t\tif hasAvg {\n1180\t\t\tleftLines = append(leftLines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Avg:   %s\", dimStyle.Render(metrics.FormatTokenRateCompact(d.tokenMetrics.SessionAvgRate))))\n1181\t\t}\n1182\t\n1183\t\t// Determine layout based on width\n1184\t\t// For narrow panels, stack vertically; for wider panels, use side-by-side\n1185\t\tmodelCount := len(d.tokenMetrics.ModelUsages)\n1186\t\tuseSideBySide := contentWidth >= 48 && modelCount > 0\n1187\t\n1188\t\t// Calculate available width for model names based on layout\n1189\t\t// In side-by-side: rightWidth = contentWidth - leftWidth(22) - separator(2)\n1190\t\t// Model line format: \"Name $XX.XX (XX,XXXtok)\" - cost ~8 chars, tokens ~12 chars = ~20 chars for cost+tokens\n1191\t\tleftWidth := 22\n1192\t\trightWidth := contentWidth - leftWidth - 2\n1193\t\tmaxModelNameWidth := rightWidth - 22 // Reserve space for cost and token count\n1194\t\tif maxModelNameWidth < 10 {\n1195\t\t\tmaxModelNameWidth = 10 // Minimum display width\n1196\t\t}\n1197\t\n1198\t\t// Build right column: Per-model costs with dynamic name width\n1199\t\tvar rightLines []string\n1200\t\tif modelCount > 0 {\n1201\t\t\trightLines = append(rightLines, boldStyle.Render(\"Models:\"))\n1202\t\t\tfor _, usage := range d.tokenMetrics.ModelUsages {\n1203\t\t\t\tdisplayName := shortenModelName(usage.Model)\n1204\t\t\t\t// Dynamically truncate based on available space\n1205\t\t\t\tif len(displayName) > maxModelNameWidth {\n1206\t\t\t\t\tdisplayName = displayName[:maxModelNameWidth-1] + \"…\"\n1207\t\t\t\t}\n1208\t\t\t\tmodelStyle := getModelStyle(usage.Model)\n1209\t\t\t\t// All model info on one line: Name Cost (Tokens)\n1210\t\t\t\tline := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s %s %s\",\n1211\t\t\t\t\tmodelStyle.Render(displayName),\n1212\t\t\t\t\tcostStyle.Render(metrics.FormatCost(usage.Cost)),\n1213\t\t\t\t\tdimStyle.Render(\"(\"+metrics.FormatTokensCompact(usage.TotalTokens)+\")\"))\n1214\t\t\t\trightLines = append(rightLines, line)\n1215\t\t\t}\n1216\t\t}\n1217\t\n1218\t\tvar lines []string\n1219\t\tlines = append(lines, headerLine)\n1220\t\n1221\t\tif useSideBySide {\n1222\t\t\t// Side-by-side: left column for totals, right for models\n1223\t\n1224\t\t\t// Pad columns to equal height\n1225\t\t\tmaxLines := len(leftLines)\n1226\t\t\tif len(rightLines) > maxLines {\n1227\t\t\t\tmaxLines = len(rightLines)\n1228\t\t\t}\n1229\t\t\tfor len(leftLines) < maxLines {\n1230\t\t\t\tleftLines = append(leftLines, \"\")\n1231\t\t\t}\n1232\t\t\tfor len(rightLines) < maxLines {\n1233\t\t\t\trightLines = append(rightLines, \"\")\n1234\t\t\t}\n1235\t\n1236\t\t\t// Combine columns\n1237\t\t\tfor i := 0; i < maxLines; i++ {\n1238\t\t\t\tleft := leftLines[i]\n1239\t\t\t\tright := rightLines[i]\n1240\t\t\t\t// Pad left to fixed width\n1241\t\t\t\tleftPadded := left + strings.Repeat(\" \", max(0, leftWidth-lipgloss.Width(left)))\n1242\t\t\t\t// Truncate right if needed (safety fallback)\n1243\t\t\t\tif lipgloss.Width(right) > rightWidth {\n1244\t\t\t\t\tright = right[:rightWidth-1] + \"…\"\n1245\t\t\t\t}\n1246\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, leftPadded+\"│ \"+right)\n1247\t\t\t}\n1248\t\t} else {\n1249\t\t\t// Stacked layout for narrow panels\n1250\t\t\tlines = append(lines, leftLines...)\n1251\t\t\tif modelCount > 0 {\n1252\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, \"\")\n1253\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, rightLines...)\n1254\t\t\t}\n1255\t\t}\n1256\t\n1257\t\tcontent := strings.Join(lines, \"\\n\")\n1258\t\treturn style.Width(width).Height(height).Render(content)\n1259\t}\n1260\t\n1261\t// shortenModelName shortens common model names for display\n1262\tfunc shortenModelName(name string) string {\n1263\t\t// Common patterns to shorten\n1264\t\treplacements := map[string]string{\n1265\t\t\t\"claude-opus-4-5-20251101\":    \"Opus 4.5\",\n1266\t\t\t\"claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929\":  \"Sonnet 4.5\",\n1267\t\t\t\"claude-haiku-4-5-20250929\":   \"Haiku 4.5\",\n1268\t\t\t\"claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022\":  \"Sonnet 3.5\",\n1269\t\t\t\"claude-3-5-haiku-20241022\":   \"Haiku 3.5\",\n1270\t\t\t\"claude-3-opus-20240229\":      \"Opus 3\",\n1271\t\t\t\"claude-3-sonnet-20240229\":    \"Sonnet 3\",\n1272\t\t\t\"claude-3-haiku-20240307\":     \"Haiku 3\",\n1273\t\t\t// GLM models (Zhipu AI)\n1274\t\t\t\"glm-4-alltools\":                \"GLM 4\",\n1275\t\t\t\"glm-4-9b-chat\":                \"GLM 4\",\n1276\t\t\t\"glm-4-air\":                     \"GLM 4\",\n1277\t\t\t\"glm-4-flash\":                   \"GLM 4\",\n1278\t\t\t\"glm-4-plus\":                    \"GLM 4+\",\n1279\t\t}\n1280\t\n1281\t\tif short, ok := replacements[name]; ok {\n1282\t\t\treturn short\n1283\t\t}\n1284\t\n1285\t\t// Try GLM partial matches\n1286\t\tif strings.Contains(name, \"glm-4\") {\n1287\t\t\treturn \"GLM 4\"\n1288\t\t}\n1289\t\tif strings.Contains(name, \"glm-3\") {\n1290\t\t\treturn \"GLM 3\"\n1291\t\t}\n1292\t\n1293\t\t// Try Claude partial matches\n1294\t\tif strings.Contains(name, \"opus-4-5\") || strings.Contains(name, \"opus-4.5\") {\n1295\t\t\treturn \"Opus 4.5\"\n1296\t\t}\n1297\t\tif strings.Contains(name, \"sonnet-4-5\") || strings.Contains(name, \"sonnet-4.5\") {\n1298\t\t\treturn \"Sonnet 4.5\"\n1299\t\t}\n1300\t\tif strings.Contains(name, \"haiku-4-5\") || strings.Contains(name, \"haiku-4.5\") {\n1301\t\t\treturn \"Haiku 4.5\"\n1302\t\t}\n1303\t\tif strings.Contains(name, \"opus\") {\n1304\t\t\treturn \"Opus\"\n1305\t\t}\n1306\t\tif strings.Contains(name, \"sonnet\") {\n1307\t\t\treturn \"Sonnet\"\n1308\t\t}\n1309\t\tif strings.Contains(name, \"haiku\") {\n1310\t\t\treturn \"Haiku\"\n1311\t\t}\n1312\t\n1313\t\treturn name\n1314\t}\n1315\t\n1316\t// calculateRequiredTokenWidth calculates the minimum width needed for the token panel\n1317\t// based on the longest model name in the current data\n1318\tfunc (d *Dashboard) calculateRequiredTokenWidth() int {\n1319\t\t// Base width needed for: \"  Name: $XXX.XX (X,XXX,XXX tok)\"\n1320\t\t// 2 (indent) + name + 2 (\": \") + 8 (cost) + 2 (\" (\") + 11 (tokens) + 5 (\" tok)\") + 6 (borders/padding)\n1321\t\tconst baseWidth = 36 // Everything except model name\n1322\t\n1323\t\tmaxNameLen := 10 // Default minimum for \"Sonnet 4.5\"\n1324\t\n1325\t\tif d.tokenMetrics != nil && len(d.tokenMetrics.ModelUsages) > 0 {\n1326\t\t\tfor _, usage := range d.tokenMetrics.ModelUsages {\n1327\t\t\t\tdisplayName := shortenModelName(usage.Model)\n1328\t\t\t\tif len(displayName) > maxNameLen {\n1329\t\t\t\t\tmaxNameLen = len(displayName)\n1330\t\t\t\t}\n1331\t\t\t}\n1332\t\t}\n1333\t\n1334\t\treturn baseWidth + maxNameLen\n1335\t}\n1336\t\n1337\t// renderTmuxPanel renders the tmux sessions panel\n1338\tfunc (d *Dashboard) renderTmuxPanel(width, height int) string {\n1339\t\tstyle := panelStyle\n1340\t\n1341\t\tif d.tmuxMetrics == nil {\n1342\t\t\treturn style.Width(width).Height(height).Render(\"Loading tmux metrics...\")\n1343\t\t}\n1344\t\n1345\t\tvar lines []string\n1346\t\n1347\t\t// Calculate content width for right-alignment\n1348\t\tcontentWidth := width - 4 // Account for borders and padding\n1349\t\n1350\t\t// Count sessions by status\n1351\t\tstatusCounts := make(map[metrics.SessionStatus]int)\n1352\t\tfor _, session := range d.tmuxMetrics.Sessions {\n1353\t\t\tstatusCounts[session.Status]++\n1354\t\t}\n1355\t\n1356\t\t// Build status summary (right-justified)\n1357\t\tvar statusParts []string\n1358\t\tif count := statusCounts[metrics.StatusWorking]; count > 0 {\n1359\t\t\tstatusParts = append(statusParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"🟢%d\", count))\n1360\t\t}\n1361\t\tif count := statusCounts[metrics.StatusReady]; count > 0 {\n1362\t\t\tstatusParts = append(statusParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"🔴%d\", count))\n1363\t\t}\n1364\t\tif count := statusCounts[metrics.StatusActive]; count > 0 {\n1365\t\t\tstatusParts = append(statusParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"🟡%d\", count))\n1366\t\t}\n1367\t\tif count := statusCounts[metrics.StatusError]; count > 0 {\n1368\t\t\tstatusParts = append(statusParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"❌%d\", count))\n1369\t\t}\n1370\t\tstatusSummary := strings.Join(statusParts, \" \")\n1371\t\n1372\t\t// Title with total count and status summary right-justified\n1373\t\t// Show source indicator: 🔗 for hooks, 📺 for tmux\n1374\t\tsourceIcon := \"📺\"\n1375\t\tsourceLabel := \"Sessions\"\n1376\t\tif d.tmuxMetrics.Source == \"hooks\" {\n1377\t\t\tsourceIcon = \"🔗\"\n1378\t\t\tsourceLabel = \"Sessions\"\n1379\t\t} else if d.tmuxMetrics.HooksInstalled && !d.tmuxMetrics.HooksAvailable {\n1380\t\t\t// Hooks installed but no hook sessions, falling back to tmux\n1381\t\t\tsourceLabel = \"Sessions (tmux)\"\n1382\t\t}\n1383\t\t// Show process count if different from tracked sessions (indicates detection gap)\n1384\t\tcountStr := fmt.Sprintf(\"%d\", d.tmuxMetrics.Total)\n1385\t\tif d.tmuxMetrics.RunningProcesses > 0 && d.tmuxMetrics.RunningProcesses != d.tmuxMetrics.Total {\n1386\t\t\tcountStr = fmt.Sprintf(\"%d/%d procs\", d.tmuxMetrics.Total, d.tmuxMetrics.RunningProcesses)\n1387\t\t}\n1388\t\ttitle := successStyle.Render(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s %s (%s)\", sourceIcon, sourceLabel, countStr))\n1389\t\ttitleLen := lipgloss.Width(title)\n1390\t\tsummaryLen := lipgloss.Width(statusSummary)\n1391\t\tspacing := contentWidth - titleLen - summaryLen\n1392\t\tif spacing < 1 {\n1393\t\t\tspacing = 1\n1394\t\t}\n1395\t\n1396\t\theaderLine := title + strings.Repeat(\" \", spacing) + statusSummary\n1397\t\tlines = append(lines, headerLine)\n1398\t\n1399\t\tif !d.tmuxMetrics.Available {\n1400\t\t\tlines = append(lines, errorStyle.Render(\"Not Available\"))\n1401\t\t\tif d.tmuxMetrics.Error != \"\" {\n1402\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, wrapText(d.tmuxMetrics.Error, width-4))\n1403\t\t\t}\n1404\t\t\tcontent := strings.Join(lines, \"\\n\")\n1405\t\t\treturn style.Width(width).Height(height).Render(content)\n1406\t\t}\n1407\t\n1408\t\tif len(d.tmuxMetrics.Sessions) == 0 {\n1409\t\t\tlines = append(lines, \"No active sessions\")\n1410\t\t\tcontent := strings.Join(lines, \"\\n\")\n1411\t\t\treturn style.Width(width).Height(height).Render(content)\n1412\t\t}\n1413\t\n1414\t\t// Calculate available lines for sessions\n1415\t\t// height includes borders, subtract: title(1) + borders(2) = 3 lines overhead\n1416\t\tavailableLines := height - 3\n1417\t\tif availableLines < 1 {\n1418\t\t\tavailableLines = 1\n1419\t\t}\n1420\t\n1421\t\tsessionCount := len(d.tmuxMetrics.Sessions)\n1422\t\tcontentWidth = width - 4 // -4 for borders (2) and padding (2)\n1423\t\n1424\t\t// Calculate columns needed to show ALL sessions (priority: show everything)\n1425\t\tminCellWidth := 28  // Minimum readable session cell\n1426\t\tmaxCellWidth := 55  // Maximum cell width to avoid excessive whitespace\n1427\t\tcols := 1\n1428\t\tif sessionCount > availableLines {\n1429\t\t\t// Calculate columns needed to fit all sessions\n1430\t\t\tcols = (sessionCount + availableLines - 1) / availableLines // ceil division\n1431\t\t}\n1432\t\n1433\t\t// Cap columns based on available width\n1434\t\tmaxCols := contentWidth / minCellWidth\n1435\t\tif maxCols < 1 {\n1436\t\t\tmaxCols = 1\n1437\t\t}\n1438\t\tif cols > maxCols {\n1439\t\t\tcols = maxCols\n1440\t\t}\n1441\t\tif cols > 4 {\n1442\t\t\tcols = 4 // Reasonable maximum for readability\n1443\t\t}\n1444\t\n1445\t\t// Calculate cell width based on actual columns used, but cap to avoid whitespace.\n1446\t\t// Only add columns for aesthetic reasons (reducing cell width) when we're already\n1447\t\t// in multi-column mode due to session count — never force multiple columns purely\n1448\t\t// for width when sessions fit comfortably in one column.\n1449\t\tcellWidth := (contentWidth - (cols - 1)) / cols\n1450\t\tif cols > 1 && cellWidth > maxCellWidth {\n1451\t\t\t// Increase columns to reduce cell width\n1452\t\t\toptimalCols := (contentWidth + maxCellWidth - 1) / maxCellWidth\n1453\t\t\tif optimalCols > cols && optimalCols <= 4 {\n1454\t\t\t\tcols = optimalCols\n1455\t\t\t\tcellWidth = (contentWidth - (cols - 1)) / cols\n1456\t\t\t} else {\n1457\t\t\t\t// Can't add more columns, just cap the width\n1458\t\t\t\tcellWidth = maxCellWidth\n1459\t\t\t}\n1460\t\t}\n1461\t\n1462\t\t// Show ALL sessions - calculate how many we can actually display\n1463\t\tmaxDisplayed := availableLines * cols\n1464\t\tmaxSessions := sessionCount\n1465\t\tif maxSessions > maxDisplayed {\n1466\t\t\tmaxSessions = maxDisplayed // Only limit if we truly can't fit more\n1467\t\t}\n1468\t\n1469\t\t// Render sessions in vertical columns (fill first column, then second, etc.)\n1470\t\trowCount := (maxSessions + cols - 1) / cols\n1471\t\tfor row := 0; row < rowCount; row++ {\n1472\t\t\tvar rowCells []string\n1473\t\t\tfor col := 0; col < cols; col++ {\n1474\t\t\t\tidx := col*rowCount + row\n1475\t\t\t\tif idx < maxSessions {\n1476\t\t\t\t\tsession := d.tmuxMetrics.Sessions[idx]\n1477\t\t\t\t\tcellContent := d.renderSessionCell(session, cellWidth)\n1478\t\t\t\t\t// Apply explicit width constraint using lipgloss\n1479\t\t\t\t\tcellStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(cellWidth)\n1480\t\t\t\t\tcell := cellStyle.Render(cellContent)\n1481\t\t\t\t\trowCells = append(rowCells, cell)\n1482\t\t\t\t} else {\n1483\t\t\t\t\t// Empty cell for alignment\n1484\t\t\t\t\temptyCell := lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(cellWidth).Render(\"\")\n1485\t\t\t\t\trowCells = append(rowCells, emptyCell)\n1486\t\t\t\t}\n1487\t\t\t}\n1488\t\t\t// Join cells with space separator for multiple columns\n1489\t\t\tseparator := \"\"\n1490\t\t\tif cols > 1 {\n1491\t\t\t\tseparator = \" \"\n1492\t\t\t}\n1493\t\t\tif len(rowCells) == 1 {\n1494\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, rowCells[0])\n1495\t\t\t} else {\n1496\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, strings.Join(rowCells, separator))\n1497\t\t\t}\n1498\t\t}\n1499\t\n1500\t\t// Show \"... and X more\" if sessions were limited\n1501\t\tif maxSessions < sessionCount {\n1502\t\t\tremaining := sessionCount - maxSessions\n1503\t\t\tlines = append(lines, dimStyle.Render(fmt.Sprintf(\"... +%d more\", remaining)))\n1504\t\t}\n1505\t\n1506\t\tcontent := strings.Join(lines, \"\\n\")\n1507\t\treturn style.Width(width).Height(height).Render(content)\n1508\t}\n1509\t\n1510\t// renderSessionCell renders a single tmux session cell\n1511\tfunc (d *Dashboard) renderSessionCell(session metrics.TmuxSession, width int) string {\n1512\t\temoji := session.Status.GetEmoji()\n1513\t\n1514\t\t// Convert ANSI color codes to hex colors for lipgloss\n1515\t\tcolorMap := map[string]string{\n1516\t\t\t\"\\033[32m\": \"#00ff00\", // Green - WORKING (Claude processing)\n1517\t\t\t\"\\033[31m\": \"#ff0000\", // Red - READY (Waiting for input)\n1518\t\t\t\"\\033[33m\": \"#ffff00\", // Yellow - ACTIVE (User in session)\n1519\t\t\t\"\\033[91m\": \"#ff5555\", // Bright Red - ERROR (Error state)\n1520\t\t\t\"\\033[0m\":  \"#ffffff\", // White/Reset\n1521\t\t}\n1522\t\n1523\t\tansiColor := session.Status.GetColor()\n1524\t\tcolor, ok := colorMap[ansiColor]\n1525\t\tif !ok {\n1526\t\t\tcolor = \"#ffffff\"\n1527\t\t}\n1528\t\n1529\t\tstatusStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color(color))\n1530\t\n1531\t\tattached := \"\"\n1532\t\tattachedWidth := 0\n1533\t\tif session.Attached {\n1534\t\t\tattached = \"📎\"\n1535\t\t\tattachedWidth = 3 // emoji + space\n1536\t\t}\n1537\t\n1538\t\t// Format: emoji name status windows idle attached\n1539\t\tstatusText := string(session.Status)\n1540\t\tif len(statusText) > 7 {\n1541\t\t\tstatusText = statusText[:7]\n1542\t\t}\n1543\t\n1544\t\t// Format idle duration\n1545\t\tidleStr := \"\"\n1546\t\tif session.IdleDuration > 0 {\n1547\t\t\tif session.IdleDuration < time.Minute {\n1548\t\t\t\tidleStr = fmt.Sprintf(\"%ds\", int(session.IdleDuration.Seconds()))\n1549\t\t\t} else if session.IdleDuration < time.Hour {\n1550\t\t\t\tidleStr = fmt.Sprintf(\"%dm\", int(session.IdleDuration.Minutes()))\n1551\t\t\t} else {\n1552\t\t\t\tidleStr = fmt.Sprintf(\"%dh\", int(session.IdleDuration.Hours()))\n1553\t\t\t}\n1554\t\t}\n1555\t\n1556\t\t// Calculate available width for session name\n1557\t\t// Fixed parts: emoji(2) + space(1) + space(1) + status(7) + space(1) + windows(~3) + space(1) + idle(3) + space(1) + attached\n1558\t\t// Fixed overhead = ~20 chars + attachedWidth\n1559\t\tfixedOverhead := 20 + attachedWidth\n1560\t\tmaxNameLen := width - fixedOverhead\n1561\t\tif maxNameLen < 6 {\n1562\t\t\tmaxNameLen = 6 // Minimum readable name length\n1563\t\t}\n1564\t\n1565\t\tname := session.Name\n1566\t\tif len(name) > maxNameLen {\n1567\t\t\tname = name[:maxNameLen-1] + \"…\"\n1568\t\t}\n1569\t\n1570\t\t// Build the line with dynamic name width\n1571\t\tnameFormat := fmt.Sprintf(\"%%-%ds\", maxNameLen)\n1572\t\tline := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s \"+nameFormat+\" %s %dw %-3s %s\",\n1573\t\t\temoji,\n1574\t\t\tname,\n1575\t\t\tstatusStyle.Render(fmt.Sprintf(\"%-7s\", statusText)),\n1576\t\t\tsession.Windows,\n1577\t\t\tidleStr,\n1578\t\t\tattached)\n1579\t\n1580\t\treturn line\n1581\t}\n1582\t\n1583\t// renderLookbackPicker renders the lookback time picker - Claude: ~/.claude/projects/*.jsonl (sessions)\n1788\t  - GLM: Not currently tracked (zai-proxy only exports Prometheus)\n1789\t\n1790\tSQLite Cache: .ccdash/tokens.db\n1791\t  Queryable with DuckDB \"github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea\"\n\t\"github.com/charmbracelet/lipgloss\"\n\t\"github.com/jedarden/ccdash/internal/metrics\"\n\t\"github.com/jedarden/ccdash/internal/updater\"\n)\n\n// Layout
